payload.answer: DELETE FROM memory_cards is denied in Admin SQL select-only mode; only SELECT operations (e.g., SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10) are permitted.

entity_resolution.reason: Delete operations are not allowed in Admin SQL select-only mode

details: SELECT is allowed as per policy

repair_options: Perform a SELECT query to retrieve IDs within the limit
Escalate to a mode that allows DELETE if necessary and permitted by policy
